## Description

**Storefront** turns a Flexweg site into a static product catalog. Posts become products: title, gallery, price, specs, descriptive long-form. The catalog grid handles filtering by category and sorting client-side without external dependencies; the quick-look modal lets visitors peek at a product without leaving the listing page.

Because Flexweg ships everything as plain HTML, the resulting catalog is indexed perfectly by search engines and stays performant on any host (no PHP, no database, no edge function). When you're ready to take orders, point each CTA at your preferred third-party (Stripe Checkout, Lemonsqueezy, contact form) — the theme stays oblivious.

Best fit: handmade goods, digital products, lookbooks, restaurant menus — anywhere a catalog matters more than a cart.
